revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[en:Decorated kofun]][[ja:装飾古墳]]
{{Short description|Ancient Japanese ornamented tombs|qq=}} {{nihongo|'''Decorated kofun'''|装飾古墳|1=Decorated kofun|sōshoku kofun|qq=}} is the term used for [[kofun]] or [[:en:Ancient Japan|Ancient Japan]]ese tombs ornamented with {{ill|Japanese painting|en|Japanese painting|qid=Q1683295|lt=painted|1=Japanese painting}} or {{ill|Japanese sculpture|en|Japanese sculpture|qid=Q3476527|lt=carved|1=Japanese sculpture}} decoration. The tombs take the form of [[:en:Tumuli|Tumuli]] or earthen mounds piled over stone chambers as well as caves excavated from the living rock. The decoration may be on the inner walls, on stone screens, on [[:en:Sarcophagi|Sarcophagi]] or, in the case of cave tombs, around the entrance on the exterior. Of the 161,560 ancient burials identified to date, around two hundred and fifty are so decorated.<ref>{{cite book |script-title=ja:装飾古墳 |trans-title=Decorated Kofun |language=Japanese, English |author=Kobayashi Yukio |publisher=Heibonsha |year=1964 |pages=124–8|qq=}}</ref><ref>{{cite book |title=Early Japanese Art: the Great Tombs and Treasures |author=Kidder, J. Edward |publisher=[[Thames and Hudson]] |year=1964 |pages=110–170, 272–324|qq=}}</ref><ref>{{cite web |url=http://www.hyogo-c.ed.jp/~shabun-bo/gyouseisituhp/top/kihonkousou/6(4).pdf |script-title=ja:兵庫県の遺跡・遺物数の全国的な位置 |trans-title=Numeric Comparison of Historic Sites in Hyōgo Prefecture with National Totals |language=Japanese |publisher=[[Hyōgo Prefecture]] |accessdate=10 August 2013|qq=}}</ref><ref>{{cite web |url=http://kyuhaku.jmc.or.jp/ |script-title=ja:装飾古墳データベース |trans-title=Decorated Tomb Database |language=Japanese |publisher=[[Kyushu National Museum]] |accessdate=10 August 2013 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20130816022032/http://kyuhaku.jmc.or.jp/ |archive-date=16 August 2013 |url-status=dead |qq=}}</ref><ref group="note">"Japanese terms: {{nihongo|tumuli|墳丘墓|funkyū-bo|qq=}}; {{nihongo|cave tombs|横穴墓|yokoana-bo|qq=}}; {{nihongo|wall painting|彩色壁画|saishiki hekiga|qq=}}; {{nihongo|incised lines|線刻|senkoku|qq=}}; {{nihongo|relief carving|浮彫|ukibori|qq=}}; {{nihongo|sekkan|石棺|1=Sekkan|1=Sekkan (Sarcophagus)|lt=Sarcophagus|sekkan|qq=}}</ref> ==Motifs== Decorative {{ill|Motif (visual arts)|en|Motif (visual arts)|qid=Q1229071|lt=motifs|1=Motif (visual arts)}} include the ''chokkomon'' (an X-shape forming triangular zones that intersect irregular curves), circles, concentric circles, triangles, human figures, horses, birds, boats, swords, shields, and quivers.<ref>{{cite web |url=http://kyuhaku.jmc.or.jp/index.php/1/-/-/-/-/-/-/m_frame.php |script-title=ja:文様 |trans-title=Decorated Tomb Database: Motifs |language=Japanese |publisher=[[Kyushu National Museum]] |accessdate=10 August 2013 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20091207195443/http://kyuhaku.jmc.or.jp/index.php/1/-/-/-/-/-/-/m_frame.php |archive-date=7 December 2009 |url-status=dead |qq=}}</ref><ref group="note">Japanese terms: {{nihongo|chokkomon|直弧文|chokkomon|qq=}}; {{nihongo|circles|円文|enmon|qq=}}; {{nihongo|concentric circles|同心円文|dōshin-enmon|qq=}}; {{nihongo|triangles|三角文|sankaku-mon|qq=}}; {{nihongo|boats|船|fune|qq=}}; {{nihongo|rings with feet|双脚輪状文|sōkyakurinjō-mon|qq=}}</ref> == List of decorated kofun == This list is of the '''decorated kofun''' of [[:en:Ancient Japan|Ancient Japan]], located in {{ill|Fukuoka Prefecture|en|Fukuoka Prefecture|qid=Q123258|lt=Fukuoka prefecture|1=Fukuoka Prefecture}}.<ref>{{cite book|author=Otomasu Shigetaka|publisher=[[Kodansha]]|year=1974|pages=152–160|language=Japanese|script-title=ja:装飾古墳の文様|trans-title=Decorated Kofun and their Motifs|qq=}}</ref><ref>{{cite web|url=http://kyuhaku.jmc.or.jp/kofun_list.php|publisher=[[Kyushu National Museum]]|language=Japanese|script-title=ja:古墳一覧|trans-title=List of Kofun|accessdate=12 August 2013|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20131204104031/http://kyuhaku.jmc.or.jp/kofun_list.php|archive-date=4 December 2013|url-status=dead|qq=}}</ref><ref name="Asahi">{{cite book|publisher=[[Asahi Shimbun]]|year=1993|editor=National Museum of Japanese History|editor-link=National Museum of Japanese History|language=Japanese|script-title=ja:装飾古墳の世界|trans-title=Special Exhibition: Decorated Tombs in Japan|qq=}}</ref> {| class="wikitable sortable" style="width: 100%;" ! class="unsortable" align="left" width="8%" |image ! align="left" width="13%" |Kofun ! align="left" width="6%" |Municipality ! align="left" width="7%" |Date ! class="unsortable" align="left" width="16%" |Tomb style ! class="unsortable" align="left" width="16%" |Decoration ! class="unsortable" align="left" width="8%" |Designation ! class="unsortable" align="left" width="8%" |Coordinates ! class="unsortable" align="left" width="4%" |Database |- | | align="center" |{{ill|Urayama Kofun|lt=Urayama Kofun|ja|浦山古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Urayama Kofun|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}{{nihongo2|浦山古墳|qq=}}<small>''Urayama kofun''</small> |{{ill|Kurume|en|Kurume|qid=Q320934|lt=Kurume|1=Kurume}} |450-500 |{{ill|Zenpokoenfun|en|Zenpokoenfun|qid=Q11268718|lt=keyhole|1=Zenpōkōenfun}} |incised (and red) concentric circles, chokkomon, kagitemon, triangles in a continuous pattern |[[Monuments of Japan|Historic Site]] [https://kunishitei.bunka.go.jp/heritage/detail/401/2641] |{{coord|33.28486335|N|130.5357237|E|type:landmark_region:JP_scale:10000|display=inline|format=dms|name=Urayama Kofun|qq=}} |[https://web.archive.org/web/20160305011320/http://kyuhaku.jmc.or.jp/d_frame.php/40/36/] |- | | align="center" |{{ill|Nichirinji Kofun|en|Nichirinji Kofun|qid=Q18337688|lt=Nichirinji Kofun|1=Nichirinji Kofun}}{{nihongo2|日輪寺古墳|qq=}}<small>''Nichirinji kofun''</small> |{{ill|Kurume|en|Kurume|qid=Q320934|lt=Kurume|1=Kurume}} |475-525 |{{ill|Zenpokoenfun|en|Zenpokoenfun|qid=Q11268718|lt=keyhole|1=Zenpōkōenfun}} |relief and incised (and red) concentric circles, chokkomon, kagitemon |[[Monuments of Japan|Historic Site]] [https://kunishitei.bunka.go.jp/heritage/detail/401/2600] |{{coord|33.32046961|N|130.49845976|E|type:landmark_region:JP_scale:10000|display=inline|format=dms|name=Nichirinji Kofun|qq=}} |[https://web.archive.org/web/20160304110303/http://kyuhaku.jmc.or.jp/d_frame.php/40/37/] |- | | align="center" |{{ill|Yamanoshita Kofun|lt=Yamanoshita Kofun|ja|山ノ下古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamanoshita Kofun|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}{{nihongo2|山ノ下古墳|qq=}}<small>''Yamanoshita kofun''</small> |{{ill|Kurume|en|Kurume|qid=Q320934|lt=Kurume|1=Kurume}} | |[[Round Kofun|round]] |red; indistinct | | |<ref name="Asahi" /> |- | | align="center" |{{ill|Shimobaba Kofun|lt=Shimobaba Kofun|ja|下馬場古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shimobaba Kofun|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}{{nihongo2|下馬場古墳|qq=}}<small>''Shimobaba kofun''</small> |{{ill|Kurume|en|Kurume|qid=Q320934|lt=Kurume|1=Kurume}} |575-600 |[[Round Kofun|round]] |red and blue concentric circles, triangles, and shields |[[Monuments of Japan|Historic Site]] [https://kunishitei.bunka.go.jp/heritage/detail/401/2638] |{{coord|33.31383824|N|130.6227841|E|type:landmark_region:JP_scale:10000|display=inline|format=dms|name=Shimobaba Kofun|qq=}} |[https://web.archive.org/web/20131204093646/http://kyuhaku.jmc.or.jp/d_frame.php/40/2/] |- | | align="center" |{{ill|Tōkō-ji Kenzuka Kofun|lt=Tōkō-ji Kenzuka Kofun|ja|東光寺剣塚古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tōkō-ji Kenzuka Kofun|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}{{nihongo2|東光寺剣塚古墳|qq=}}<small>''Tōkō-ji Kenzuka kofun''</small> |{{ill|Fukuoka|en|Fukuoka|qid=Q26600|lt=Fukuoka|1=Fukuoka}} |525-575 |{{ill|Zenpokoenfun|en|Zenpokoenfun|qid=Q11268718|lt=keyhole|1=Zenpōkōenfun}} |incised boats | |{{coord|33.573849|N|130.432756|E|type:landmark_region:JP_scale:10000|display=inline|format=dms|name=Tōkō-ji Kenzuka Kofun|qq=}} |[http://kyuhaku.jmc.or.jp/d_frame.php/40/55/] |- | | align="center" |{{ill|Sakurakyō Kofun 2|lt=Sakurakyō Kofun 2|ja|桜京古墳 (２号古墳)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sakurakyō Kofun 2|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}{{nihongo2|桜京古墳 (２号古墳)|qq=}}<small>''Sakurakyō nigō kofun''</small> |{{ill|Munakata, Fukuoka|en|Munakata, Fukuoka|qid=Q819603|lt=Munakata|1=Munakata, Fukuoka}} |550-600 |{{ill|Zenpokoenfun|en|Zenpokoenfun|qid=Q11268718|lt=keyhole|1=Zenpōkōenfun}} |red and green triangles, in a continuous pattern |[[Monuments of Japan|Historic Site]] [https://kunishitei.bunka.go.jp/heritage/detail/401/2674] |{{coord|33.84389006|N|130.4953238|E|type:landmark_region:JP_scale:10000|display=inline|format=dms|name=Sakurakyō Kofun 2|qq=}} |[https://web.archive.org/web/20160304191952/http://kyuhaku.jmc.or.jp/d_frame.php/40/56/] |- | | align="center" |{{ill|Haburakan Yokoanabo Cluster|lt=Haburakan Yokoanabo Cluster|ja|埴生羅漢山横穴墓群|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Haburakan Yokoanabo Cluster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}{{nihongo2|埴生羅漢山横穴墓群|qq=}}<small>''Haburakan yokoana bogun''</small> |{{ill|Nakama, Fukuoka|en|Nakama, Fukuoka|qid=Q847601|lt=Nakama|1=Nakama, Fukuoka}} |575-650 |{{ill|corridor-type kofun|lt=cave|ja|横穴墓|1=Yokoanabo|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/corridor-type kofun|13=User:Immanuelle/Yokoanabo|qq=}} |incised boats | |{{coord|33.815845|N|130.698638|E|type:landmark_region:JP_scale:10000|display=inline|format=dms|name=Haburakan Yokoanabo Cluster|qq=}} |[http://kyuhaku.jmc.or.jp/d_frame.php/40/60/] |- | | align="center" |{{ill|Seto Cave 14|lt=Seto Cave 14|ja|瀬戸14号横穴|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Seto Cave 14|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}{{nihongo2|瀬戸14号横穴|qq=}}<small>''Seto jūyongō yokoana''</small> |{{ill|Nakama, Fukuoka|en|Nakama, Fukuoka|qid=Q847601|lt=Nakama|1=Nakama, Fukuoka}} | |{{ill|corridor-type kofun|lt=cave|ja|横穴墓|1=Yokoanabo|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/corridor-type kofun|13=User:Immanuelle/Yokoanabo|qq=}}; replica at the {{nihongo|Nakama City Museum of History and Folklore|中間市歴史民俗資料館|qq=}} |red boats, human figures, horses, and birds | |{{coord|33.817841|N|130.699689|E|type:landmark_region:JP_scale:10000|display=inline|format=dms|name=Seto Cave 14|qq=}} | |- | | align="center" |{{ill|Doinouchi Cave|lt=Doinouchi Cave|ja|土居の内横穴|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Doinouchi Cave|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}{{nihongo2|土居の内横穴|qq=}}<small>''Doinouchi yokoana''</small> |{{ill|Nakama, Fukuoka|en|Nakama, Fukuoka|qid=Q847601|lt=Nakama|1=Nakama, Fukuoka}} | |{{ill|corridor-type kofun|lt=cave|ja|横穴墓|1=Yokoanabo|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/corridor-type kofun|13=User:Immanuelle/Yokoanabo|qq=}} |incised boats | |{{coord|33.818982|N|130.700269|E|type:landmark_region:JP_scale:10000|display=inline|format=dms|name=Doinouchi Cave|qq=}} | |- | | align="center" |{{ill|Furutsuki Yokoanabo Cluster (Cave 9)|lt=Furutsuki Yokoanabo Cluster (Cave 9)|ja|古月横穴墓群 (９号横穴)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Furutsuki Yokoanabo Cluster (Cave 9)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}{{nihongo2|古月横穴墓群 (９号横穴)|qq=}}<small>''Furutsuki yokoana bogun''</small> |{{ill|Kurate, Fukuoka|en|Kurate, Fukuoka|qid=Q629799|lt=Kurate|1=Kurate, Fukuoka}} |550-650 |{{ill|corridor-type kofun|lt=cave|ja|横穴墓|1=Yokoanabo|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/corridor-type kofun|13=User:Immanuelle/Yokoanabo|qq=}} |whitened and incised indistinct grid pattern |[[Monuments of Japan|Historic Site]] [https://kunishitei.bunka.go.jp/heritage/detail/401/2623] |{{coord|33.80384288|N|130.66922356|E|type:landmark_region:JP_scale:10000|display=inline|format=dms|name=Furutsuki Yokoanabo Cluster|qq=}} |[http://kyuhaku.jmc.or.jp/d_frame.php/40/62/] |- |[[File:Takehara_kofun.png|150x150px]] | align="center" |[[Takehara Kofun]]{{nihongo2|[[:ja:竹原古墳|竹原古墳]]|qq=}}<small>''Takehara kofun''</small> |[[:en:Miyawaka, Fukuoka|Miyawaka]] |550-600 |[[Round Kofun|round]] |black and red human figure, horse, dragon, fans, boat, waves |[[Monuments of Japan|Historic Site]] [https://kunishitei.bunka.go.jp/heritage/detail/401/2648] |{{coord|33.73314575|N|130.61051484|E|type:landmark_region:JP_scale:10000|display=inline|format=dms|name=Takehara Kofun|qq=}} |[https://web.archive.org/web/20160304225911/http://kyuhaku.jmc.or.jp/d_frame.php/40/25/] |- |[[File:Ozuka_Kofun.JPG|150x150px]] | align="center" |[[Ōzuka Kofun]]{{nihongo2|[[:ja:王塚古墳|王塚古墳]]|qq=}}<small>''Ōzuka kofun''</small> |{{ill|Keisen, Fukuoka|en|Keisen, Fukuoka|qid=Q1206263|lt=Keisen|1=Keisen, Fukuoka}} |525-575 |{{ill|Zenpokoenfun|en|Zenpokoenfun|qid=Q11268718|lt=keyhole|1=Zenpōkōenfun}} |red, green, yellow and black circles, concentric circles, triangles, birds, circular patterns with twin feet, vegetal motifs, quivers, bows, swords, shields, riders |[[Monuments of Japan|Special Historic Site]] [https://kunishitei.bunka.go.jp/heritage/detail/401/2631] |{{coord|33.58873401|N|130.66359466|E|type:landmark_region:JP_scale:10000|display=inline|format=dms|name=Ōzuka Kofun|qq=}} |[https://web.archive.org/web/20160304125602/http://kyuhaku.jmc.or.jp/d_frame.php/40/23/] |- | | align="center" |{{ill|Togami Kannonzuka Kofun|lt=Togami Kannonzuka Kofun|ja|砥上観音塚古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Togami Kannonzuka Kofun|1=Tokami Kannonzuka Kofun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q126604341}}{{nihongo2|砥上観音塚古墳|qq=}}<small>''Togami Kannonzuka kofun''</small> |{{ill|Chikuzen, Fukuoka|en|Chikuzen, Fukuoka|qid=Q1072679|lt=Chikuzen|1=Chikuzen, Fukuoka}} |575-600 |[[Round Kofun|round]] |red circles, boats, riders | |{{coord|33.481102|N|130.606327|E|type:landmark_region:JP_scale:10000|display=inline|format=dms|name=Kannonzuka Kofun|qq=}} |[http://kyuhaku.jmc.or.jp/d_frame.php/40/20/] |- | | align="center" |{{ill|Kitsunezuka Kofun|lt=Kitsunezuka Kofun|ja|狐塚古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kitsunezuka Kofun|qq=}}{{nihongo2|狐塚古墳|qq=}}<small>''Kitsunezuka kofun''</small> |{{ill|Asakura, Fukuoka|en|Asakura, Fukuoka|qid=Q720625|lt=Asakura|1=Asakura, Fukuoka}} |600-625 |[[Round Kofun|round]] |incised circles, concentric circles, boats, horses | |{{coord|33.388166|N|130.712832|E|type:landmark_region:JP_scale:10000|display=inline|format=dms|name=Kitsunezuka Kofun|qq=}} |[https://web.archive.org/web/20160304120457/http://kyuhaku.jmc.or.jp/d_frame.php/40/51/] |- | | align="center" |{{ill|Miyajidake Kofun|lt=Miyajidake Kofun|ja|宮地嶽古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Miyajidake Kofun|qq=}}{{nihongo2|宮地嶽古墳|qq=}}<small>''Miyajidake kofun''</small> |{{ill|Asakura, Fukuoka|en|Asakura, Fukuoka|qid=Q720625|lt=Asakura|1=Asakura, Fukuoka}} | |[[Round Kofun|round]] |red and blue circles | |{{coord|33.398736|N|130.728207|E|type:landmark_region:JP_scale:10000|display=inline|format=dms|name=Miyajidake Kofun|qq=}} | |- |[[File:Gorōyama_Kofun_(building).jpg|167x167px]] | align="center" |[[Gorōyama kofun|Gorōyama Kofun]]{{nihongo2|五郎山古墳|qq=}}<small>''Gorōyama kofun''</small> |{{ill|Chikushino, Fukuoka|en|Chikushino, Fukuoka|qid=Q844140|lt=Chikushino|1=Chikushino, Fukuoka}} |550-600 |[[Round Kofun|round]] |red, black, and green quivers, bows, boats, houses, horses, birds, human figures, riders |[[Monuments of Japan|Historic Site]] [https://kunishitei.bunka.go.jp/heritage/detail/401/2640] |{{coord|33.45192865|N|130.54520153|E|type:landmark_region:JP_scale:10000|display=inline|format=dms|name=Gorōyama Kofun|qq=}} |[https://web.archive.org/web/20160304191748/http://kyuhaku.jmc.or.jp/d_frame.php/40/22/] | |- |[[File:Haginoo Kofun interior.jpg|167x167px]] | align="center" |[[Haginoo Kofun]]{{nihongo2|萩ノ尾古墳|qq=}}<small>''Haginoo kofun''</small> |{{ill|Ōmuta, Fukuoka|en|Ōmuta, Fukuoka|qid=Q385623|lt= Ōmuta|1=Ōmuta, Fukuoka}} |c.600 |[[Round Kofun|round]] |red and black; concentric circles, triangles, quivers, bows, boats |[[Monuments of Japan|Historic Site]] [https://bunka.nii.ac.jp/db/heritages/detail/202866] |{{coord|33|00|11|N|130|28|15|E|type:landmark_region:JP_scale:10000|display=inline|format=dms|name=Haginoo Kofun|qq=}} |[https://web.archive.org/web/20160304191748/http://kyuhaku.jmc.or.jp/d_frame.php/40/22/] |- |} ==See also== * [[Kofun period]] * [[Takamatsuzuka Tomb|Takamatsuzuka kofun]] * [[Kumamoto Prefectural Ancient Kofun Museum]] ==Notes== {{Reflist|group=note|qq=}} ==References== {{Reflist|qq=}} ==External links== * {{in lang|ja|qq=}} [https://web.archive.org/web/20130816022032/http://kyuhaku.jmc.or.jp/ Decorated Tomb Database] Decorated kofun
